title: Tool registry built-in save_data compatibility lane precheck
delta_summary: local registry registers built-in `save_data` tool in constructor
save_data executor honors execution context `data_dir` and treats explicit `.` as context directory

risk_signals.evidence: runtime/tests rely on save_data being available without external MCP registration
risk_signals.impact: upstream replay can remove save_data and break context-propagation + built-in tool flows

risk_signals.evidence: execution-context data_dir should override session/inputs for deterministic artifact paths
risk_signals.impact: missing override causes writes into incorrect directories and flaky runtime behavior

planned_validation: uv run --package framework pytest core/tests/test_tool_registry.py -k 'builtin_save_data or concurrency_safe_tools' -q
decision_gate: prefer keep_local if built-in save_data contract remains required and targeted registry/context tests are green
